---
import type { HTMLTag, Polymorphic } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

import {
  typographyListItemStyle,
  typographyOrderedListStyle,
  typographyListStyle,
  typographyUnorderedListStyle,
  toArbitrarySelectorClass,
} from "./typography-styles"

type Props<Tag extends "ul" | "ol"> = Polymorphic<{ as: Tag }>

const { as: Tag = "ul", class: className, ...props } = Astro.props as Props<
  HTMLTag & ("ul" | "ol")
>
---

<Tag
  data-slot="typography-list"
  class={cn(
    typographyListStyle,
    Tag === "ol" ? typographyOrderedListStyle : typographyUnorderedListStyle,
    toArbitrarySelectorClass("&>li", typographyListItemStyle),
    className
  )}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</Tag>

--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { typographyListItemStyle } from "./typography-styles" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"li"> const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

---
import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

import { typographySmallStyle } from "./typography-styles"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"small">

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props
---

<small
  data-slot="typography-small"
  class={cn(typographySmallStyle, className)}
  {...props}
>
  <slot />
</small>

--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { typographyTableContainerStyle, typographyTableStyle, } from "./typography-styles" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"table"> & { containerClass?: string } const { class: className, containerClass, ...props } = Astro.props ---

import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

import { typographyTableHeadStyle } from "./typography-styles"

type Props = HTMLAttributes<"th">

const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props

  <slot />

--- import type { HTMLAttributes } from "astro/types" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { typographyTableCellStyle } from "./typography-styles" type Props = HTMLAttributes<"td"> const { class: className, ...props } = Astro.props ---

export {
  typographyAStyle,
  typographyBlockquoteStyle,
  typographyH1Style,
  typographyH2Style,
  typographyH3Style,
  typographyH4Style,
  typographyHrStyle,
  typographyInlineCodeStyle,
  typographyLargeStyle,
  typographyLeadStyle,
  typographyListItemStyle,
  typographyListStyle,
  typographyMutedStyle,
  typographyOrderedListStyle,
  typographyPStyle,
  typographyPreStyle,
  typographySmallStyle,
  typographyTableCellStyle,
  typographyTableContainerStyle,
  typographyTableHeadStyle,
  typographyTableRowStyle,
  typographyTableStyle,
  typographyUnorderedListStyle,
  toArbitrarySelectorClass,
} from "./typography-styles"

export { default as Typography } from "./typography.astro"
export { default as TypographyA } from "./typography-a.astro"
export { default as TypographyBlockquote } from "./typography-blockquote.astro"
export { default as TypographyH1 } from "./typography-h1.astro"
export { default as TypographyH2 } from "./typography-h2.astro"
export { default as TypographyH3 } from "./typography-h3.astro"
export { default as TypographyH4 } from "./typography-h4.astro"
export { default as TypographyInlineCode } from "./typography-inline-code.astro"
export { default as TypographyLarge } from "./typography-large.astro"
export { default as TypographyLead } from "./typography-lead.astro"
export { default as TypographyList } from "./typography-list.astro"
export { default as TypographyListItem } from "./typography-list-item.astro"
export { default as TypographyMuted } from "./typography-muted.astro"
export { default as TypographyP } from "./typography-p.astro"
export { default as TypographySmall } from "./typography-small.astro"
export { default as TypographyTable } from "./typography-table.astro"
export { default as TypographyTableCell } from "./typography-table-cell.astro"
export { default as TypographyTableHead } from "./typography-table-head.astro"
export { default as TypographyTableRow } from "./typography-table-row.astro"
